name_en: In Stock🔥 Chanel 23a Haute Couture Tweed Backpack. I fell in love with this small bag at first glance. Unlike the Duma, it has no flap. The overall design feels warm and comfortable, giving the impression of gradually entering autumn. The cute detail is that the bag is mainly made of tweed texture, with a brown leather pocket at the front. Ready to ship, order now! 🤩🤩
